# graphical solution checking

## Short Teaching Summary
graphical solution checking: If a graph is available, it is much easier to tell how many solutions an equation has than by solving it algebraically. Map connection: this idea links by analogy_for to nearby concepts. Pause point: say the main idea in one short phrase before moving on.
